3. How do PLANETS EFFECT THE ACTIONS OF
HUMAN BEINGS AND ALL THE CREATURES?
The whole world may be likened to a vehicle. Petrol is
required to run the Vehicle. But if the Carburetor becomes rich
with petrol, the vehicle does not start at all. If there is no air in
universe, aeroplane cannot move.
Notwithstanding that a vehicle may be in good condition,
journey cannot be performed without a Driver. That is to say, that
when everything is in order, the vehicle moves otherwise not.

2 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
The nine planets, called Navagrahas are the composition of
PANCHA TATVAS- The 5 elements making up the Universe
namely .. Earth, water, frre Wind and Ether.
Learned Master Sri MADHVACHARY A, founder of
Madhwa Philosophy says :-
"HARIHI PARATATWAHA
JEEVA GANO
TATWATAHA BEDHAHA"
When a native is born, these planets are in various signs (in
directional aspects) in the form of rays. Those radiations define
and determine the nature and future of the native.
